name: QA 1457
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1457

Exercise HTTPS access to the PMWEBAPI(3).



Copyright (c) 2019,2021-2022 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream9-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:

Exercise HTTPS access to the PMWEBAPI(3).

Copyright (c) 2019,2021-2022 Red Hat.

To reproduce this test, please run:
